task: Compare available plans for the AeroAPI on Flightaware.
final_result_response:
Here is the full comparison of the three available AeroAPI plans on FlightAware:

---

## AeroAPI Available Plans Comparison

FlightAware offers **3 tiers** for AeroAPI: **Personal**, **Standard**, and **Premium**.

---

### 1. Personal
- **Purpose:** Storage and distribution of derivative works for **personal or academic** purposes only.
- **Pricing:** Per-query usage fees (up to **$5 free/month**, or **$10 free/month** for ADS-B feeders)
- **Monthly Minimum Fee:** **No minimum**
- **Rate Limit:** 10 result sets/minute
- **Included APIs:**
  - ✅ Static maps and imagery
  - ✅ Current flight status and tracks
  - ❌ Alerts
  - ❌ Historical Flight Data
  - ❌ FlightAware Foresight
  - ❌ Aireon Space-Based ADS-B
- **Authorized Users:** Internal Use for Personal, Academic
- **Support:** None
- **Volume Discounting:** ❌
- **Up-time Guarantee:** None
- **Invoicing:** ❌

---

### 2. Standard
- **Purpose:** Storage and distribution of derivative works for **business or business-to-consumer** purposes. Everything in Personal tier plus more.
- **Pricing:** Per-query usage fees (subject to monthly minimum)
- **Monthly Minimum Fee:** **$100/month**
- **Rate Limit:** 5 result sets/second
- **History Results Rate Limit:** 500,000 result sets/month
- **Included APIs:**
  - ✅ Static maps and imagery
  - ✅ Historical Flight Data
  - ✅ Alerts / Flight Alerting
  - ❌ FlightAware Foresight
  - ❌ Aireon Space-Based ADS-B
- **Authorized Users:** Internal Use for Personal, Academic, Internal Use for Business, B2C Commercialization
- **Support:** ✅ Email support
- **Volume Discounting:** ✅
- **Up-time Guarantee:** None
- **Invoicing:** ❌

---

### 3. Premium
- **Purpose:** Storage and distribution of derivative works for **business, business-to-consumer commercial purposes, and all Business-to-Business** commercial purposes. Everything in Standard tier plus more.
- **Pricing:** Per-query usage fees (subject to monthly minimum)
- **Monthly Minimum Fee:** **$1,000/month**
- **Rate Limit:** 100 result sets/second
- **History Results Rate Limit:** 500,000 result sets/month
- **Included APIs:**
  - ✅ Static maps and imagery
  - ✅ Historical Flight Data
  - ✅ Alerts / Flight Alerting
  - ✅ FlightAware Foresight*
  - ✅ Aireon Space-Based ADS-B*
- **Authorized Users:** All use cases — Personal, Academic, Internal Business, B2C, **and B2B** Commercialization
- **Support:** ✅ Email **and** Phone support
- **Volume Discounting:** ✅
- **Up-time Guarantee:** **99.5%**
- **Invoicing:** ✅

*(\* Contact FlightAware to enable; some restrictions apply.)*

---

### Volume Discounting (Standard & Premium)
| Monthly Usage | Discount |
|---|---|
| $0 – $1,000 | No Discount |
| $1,000 – $2,000 | 30% |
| $2,000 – $4,000 | 51% |
| $4,000 – $8,000 | 65% |
| $8,000 – $16,000 | 76% |
| $16,000 – $32,000 | 83% |
| $32,000 – $64,000 | 88% |
| Above $64,000 | 94% |
